description: Derive presentation strings from live state as DATA — the replacement for a per-frame host mirror() loop. Each binding reads a world.state (or entity.state) value and floors/rounds/ceils/compacts/templates/maps it into the world.state key a text or HUD sprite binds to. No schema change (the text-sprite `bind` slot already exists). Covers: flooring a float score, compacting a currency (1.23K/4.5M), 'Wave {v}/{c}' templates, multiplying by a prestige key, reading a child entity's hp, and mapping win/lose to a label.

bindings.description: Array of { from?, fromEntity?, fallback?, mult?, format?(floor|round|ceil|compact|fixed:N), map?, mapDefault?, emptyWhenZero?, template?({v}/{c}), constant?, to } — each writes one display key. Numeric leaves must be $cfg refs.
